purpose: Record official Costa Rica source catalogs and exact next review steps before importing Pacuare hydrography, hydrology, protected-area, access, or rain-fed flow evidence.

reviewed_official_service_catalogs.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica / IDECORI
reviewed_official_service_catalogs.review_gate: Record exact service URL, layer title/name, CRS, responsible institution, terms, attribution, publication sensitivity, and download/redistribution status before importing any features.

reviewed_official_service_catalogs.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica / IDECORI
candidate_uses: candidate station or water-resource layer discovery
reviewed_official_service_catalogs.review_gate: Use as a manual review entry point only until the backing services, layer names, attributes, CRS, and terms are captured from official metadata.
Use the WMS catalog for layer discovery only until GetCapabilities metadata, attributes, station coordinates, units, terms, and redistribution limits are reviewed.

candidate_uses: water-resource policy and dataset ownership context
reviewed_official_service_catalogs.review_gate: Record exact data owner, service terms, station metadata, and allowed use before using any derived flow or station data.

candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: Likely official aforo/gauging layer candidate for discharge/stage station discovery near the Pacuare basin.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Capture station IDs, names, coordinates, variables, units, record coverage, time zone, quality flags, basin relation, terms, and guide interpretation before numeric Pacuare flow bands are allowed.

candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: Official WMS capabilities advertise a hydrometric station layer candidate; review basin proximity, owner, public record access, and whether it is relevant to the Pacuare watershed.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Do not use for flow bands until station IDs, variables, units, record coverage, basin relation, terms, and guide interpretation are recorded.

candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: Official hydrologic-unit layer candidate for checking whether station and rainfall sources are in the correct Pacuare basin relation.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Review CRS, boundaries, attribute definitions, publication terms, and relation to the lower Pacuare corridor before using it for station selection.

candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: ICE basin context can cross-check drainage and rain-fed response assumptions for Pacuare flow tuning.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Use only after layer provenance, attributes, CRS, terms, and relation to IMN/ICE hydromet data are recorded.

candidate_layer_review_queue.layer_or_service: SNIT Recurso Hidrico viewer backing layers
candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: Primary official Costa Rica path for replacing the Unreal-preview Pacuare centerline scaffold with real hydrography and access/protected-area context.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Do not import until exact backing service/layer metadata, CRS, terms, attribute semantics, visible-imagery alignment, and guide/outfitter stationing review are complete.

candidate_layer_review_queue.why_it_matters: Detailed Pacuare route packages and screenshots need protected-area and access publication constraints before public-facing review.
candidate_layer_review_queue.promotion_gate: Record exact layers, responsible institution, terms, attribution, sensitive-location policy, and allowed screenshot/publication detail before detailed route packages are committed.

next_actions: Fetch and archive GetCapabilities metadata for the SNIT and Direccion de Agua services without importing features.
Identify whether DA_AFOROS or another official layer contains Pacuare-relevant discharge or stage stations.
Intersect hydrologic-unit candidates with the draft Pacuare bounds before selecting rainfall/stage stations.
Keep the Unreal-preview centerline as annotation scaffolding until official hydrography and guide stationing replace or validate it.
